ab: nengi ta. siangatu pa ita ti.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: qiRi ka! subat!
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: patudan nengi isu.
en: B: Hello.

ab: qadded ka.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: nengi ta. setangi tud pa patudan tu sikawman na kebalan saqanan naqunian ta sumanu.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的噶瑪蘭語語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say Kavalan language for food.

ab: suppaR isu mipil tu sikawman na patudan ni?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: patudan, Rayngu iku. qanengi isu semanu qaqelisa ni?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: mai qaipil ku, qanengi qaRayan tu kitut suni ni?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: tayta ika zau! qasulun iku meliyam kelisa.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: A: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: nengi niliyaman.
en: A: It’s very well read.

ab: uman ka meliyam qakelisa. qaRaya ika meliam tu kiya.
en: A: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: qalimek ka. naRin sikawma.
en: A: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: pazukat ka tu sudad.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: en, patudan.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: pazukat ka tu bilu.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: patudan, kalingun ti iku mazas tu bilu.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: pazukat ka tu sasupasan.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: patudan, kalingun ti iku mazas tu sasupasan.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: liway ka tu ta kinilan ay kaput tu sasupasan.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: paliway iku tu sasupasan qanengi ni?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: sanga pa ita ti temaqsi.
en: Class is over.

ab: tuzus pa ita tu tazian temaqsi, muman lipayan qawka muman simtayta.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
